# agent-mailbox-mcp

> MCP Server for inter-agent messaging — SQS-style mailbox for multi-agent AI systems. Provides 14 tools for sending, receiving, threading, broadcasting, and managing messages between AI agents via the Model Context Protocol.

## Quick Start

Run with npx: `npx -y agent-mailbox-mcp`

Configure in Claude Code: `claude mcp add agent-mailbox --transport stdio -- npx -y agent-mailbox-mcp`

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/lleontor705/agent-mailbox-mcp/blob/master/README.md): Full documentation with configuration examples
- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/lleontor705/agent-mailbox-mcp/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference for LLMs
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/agent-mailbox-mcp): Package on npm

## Tools (14 total)

### Messaging (11 tools)
- `msg_send`: Send a message to another agent with priority, threading, and dedup
- `msg_read_inbox`: Read unread messages (marks as delivered, sorted by priority)
- `msg_acknowledge`: Acknowledge a message, optionally reply
- `msg_broadcast`: Send to all registered agents
- `msg_search`: Search messages by content
- `msg_request`: Synchronous request/reply with polling
- `msg_list_threads`: List conversation threads with unread counts
- `msg_get`: Get a single message by ID
- `msg_delete`: Delete acked or delivered messages
- `msg_count`: Count messages by status
- `msg_update_status`: Admin status updates

### Registry (3 tools)
- `agent_register`: Register agent with name and role
- `msg_list_agents`: List all registered agents
- `msg_activity_feed`: Recent activity feed with statistics
